outcome.headline: Agent's very first API call returned 429 quota-exhausted; no solution.py was ever produced.
outcome.what_verifier_checked: Whether solution.py prints the number of maximal cow-to-barn matchings mod 1e9+7 for the USACO test cases.
outcome.what_agent_produced: Nothing — the agent process exited with code 1 after the upstream LLM endpoint rejected the request.
outcome.exact_failure_quote: API Error: Request rejected (429) · quota exhausted

failure_modes.name: LLM endpoint quota exhausted on first request
failure_modes.description: The agent's first (and only) generation call to the mimo-v2.5-pro endpoint was rejected with HTTP 429 quota exhausted, causing the claude CLI to exit with code 1 before any reasoning, code, or file write occurred.
failure_modes.evidence_quote: API Error: Request rejected (429) · quota exhausted

counterfactual.X: Sufficient API quota / a healthy LLM endpoint at the time of the call
counterfactual.Y: The agent would have produced reasoning and a solution.py instead of exiting immediately

reward_hacking.evidence: No agent output of any kind; nothing to evaluate for hacking.

task_quality.structural_hackability_notes: Verifier compares program output to expected USACO test outputs; not exploitable. Failure here is infrastructure, not task design.

notes_for_aggregation: Pure infrastructure failure: upstream LLM endpoint returned 429 on the first request. Trial contains zero agent reasoning or code; should be excluded from model-capability aggregates and counted as an env/provider outage.
